author: doll-agent
content: Add BufferDescriptor<'a> repr(C) struct with data ptr, ndim, shape, strides_bytes, dtype, itemsize, c_contiguous, f_contiguous fields. Add buffer_descriptor() default method to AsRawBuffer that aggregates all the existing fields. Caller-managed lifetime via 'a. 2 tests covering field aggregation and repr(C) consistency.
